arts.ttl: Bournemouth v Fulham: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the Vitality Stadium, kick-off 8pm BST Premier League talking points | Live league table A bit of pre-match reading Former Bournemouth manager Eddie Howe, who was taken ill last weekend, has been diagnosed with pneumonia and is likely to miss Newcastle’s games against Crystal Palace and Aston Villa this week. A huge thank you to everyone connected with Newcastle United and the wider football community for your messages and warm wishes. They have meant a lot to me and my family. I also want to pay tribute to our incredible NHS and the hospital staff who have treated me. I’m immensely grateful for the specialist care I’m receiving and, after a period of recovery, I look forward to being back as soon as possible. Continue reading...

arts.sum: On winter deadline day, AFC Bournemouth completed the signing of Eli Junior Kroupi and sent him back on loan to FC Lorient until the end of this season. Two months ago, the striker stated he wanted to finish the season at the Ligue 2 side and help them return to the top division. arts.ttl: ‘Soon’ – Bournemouth player and entourage have clear desire for transfer
arts.sum: Last month, claims from Spain discussed Real Madrid as an option for AFC Bournemouth’s Dean Huijsen. The centre-back made 29 appearances since joining Bournemouth from Juventus last summer. His performances have helped him make debut for Spain in March and has also attracted interest from clubs in England and across Europe. arts.ttl: Analysis: What's behind Bournemouth's poor form?
arts.sum: The Cherries can still qualify for Europe, but Monday night’s match at home to Fulham, a side three points better off than them, feels like a must-win for Andoni Iraola ’s side. Iraola’s men led 2-0 at Tottenham Hotspur, only to draw the game, and last time out they also scored first before taking home just a solitary point at West Ham United .
